purpose: Blindly compare two temporary Ideakit artifacts without treating either as factual truth.
scoring: Score each dimension 1-5, cite artifact passages, then choose A, B, or tie. Verify cited claims separately. For breakthrough work, compare canonical idea cores before surface wording and judge surprise, inevitability in hindsight, solo enterability, and value capture independently; do not collapse them into one total. For every software or digital product brief, apply the default AI engineering foundation: judge changed engineering economics, founder directability, verification, and operational control without using human coding hours or conventional headcount as the scope ceiling.

dimensions.name: venture_originality
dimensions.question: Does the work contain a non-obvious thesis and value mechanism rather than category nouns with technology pasted on?

dimensions.name: reasoning_provenance
dimensions.question: Can consequential concepts be traced through Observed, Inferred, and Bet without laundering inference into fact?

dimensions.name: structural_diversity
dimensions.question: Do finalists differ in causal thesis, scarce asset, proof loop, and value mechanism rather than wording? A different actor, payer, vertical, trigger, or channel alone is insufficient.

dimensions.name: entrepreneurial_quality
dimensions.question: Are trigger, buyer, wedge, first-user distribution, affordable loss, expansion, and possible compounding power credible?

dimensions.name: counter_case
dimensions.question: Does the work steelman disconfirming evidence, adoption friction, incumbent response, and what would make the bet wrong?

dimensions.name: founder_specificity
dimensions.question: Could this work only have come from this founder's means, taste, obsession, constraints, and desired game?

dimensions.name: editorial_quality
dimensions.question: Is the prose direct, specific, varied, and free of generator dialect or template theater?

dimensions.name: actionable_learning
dimensions.question: Does the output enable a concrete directional choice or cheap informative test without pretending certainty?

dimensions.name: causal_depth
dimensions.question: For a force brief, does reasoning reach changed behavior and structural rearrangement rather than stopping at direct mitigation?

dimensions.name: thesis_diversity
dimensions.question: Do finalists originate from different source consequences and causal mechanisms, not merely different buyers or business models?

dimensions.name: query_escape
dimensions.question: Did research use the independent language of ring-2/3 domains instead of repeating the force vocabulary in most queries?

dimensions.name: centroid_distance
dimensions.question: Does the portfolio move beyond the first direct categories most generators would associate with the force while keeping a defensible causal chain?

dimensions.name: revelation_surprise
dimensions.question: Does each breakthrough finalist overturn a specific default assumption with a crisp revelation, rather than merely using provocative language?

dimensions.name: inevitable_in_hindsight
dimensions.question: After the causal thesis and mechanism are explained, does the opportunity feel coherent and hard to unsee rather than arbitrary or contrarian for effect?

dimensions.name: solo_enterability
dimensions.question: Can this founder reach a first paid value test within the stated time, money, access, support, coordination-dependency, and affordable-loss constraints without shrinking the thesis into a generic service?

dimensions.name: value_capture
dimensions.question: Is there a named payer and buying occasion, a clear exchange for the mechanism, viable solo capacity economics, and a credible leverage path if founder hours cap growth?

dimensions.name: collision_resistance
dimensions.question: After canonicalizing actor, trigger/job, causal thesis, mechanism, payer, architecture, and wedge, are finalists distinct from one another and from obvious cliché or prior-art categories? Candidates matching on any three of buyer relationship, input corpus, operating workflow, and compounding asset are one venture family and must be merged.

dimensions.name: engineering_cost_curve_reconstruction
dimensions.question: Under the default AI engineering foundation for software, does the concept identify engineering work, coordination, customization, integration, or maintenance whose economics changed—and a product or business boundary that changes with it—rather than merely claiming faster coding? The product may contain no customer-facing or runtime AI.

dimensions.name: founder_directability
dimensions.question: Can one founder direct the AI engineering organization through explicit intent, decomposition, interfaces, acceptance criteria, and escalation without becoming the implementation bottleneck?

dimensions.name: verification_and_operational_control
dimensions.question: Are tests, evals, integration gates, observability, permissions, rollback, failure containment, maintenance, and the recurring human-attention budget credible for the proposed product breadth?

discover: behavioral evidence rather than flattering identity claims
minimum viable interview and user energy
structurally different playing fields with disconfirmers
generate: causal depth and query escape for force briefs
revelation surprise and inevitable-in-hindsight coherence for breakthrough mode
solo enterability after divergent invention, not as an early creativity constraint
payer, capacity economics, and value capture as a non-compensating gate
canonical-core collision resistance against duplicate and cliché ideas
engineering cost-curve reconstruction and organizational compression under the default AI engineering foundation
founder directability, verification, operational control, and bounded human attention without a human-labor ceiling
explore: defensible reframes rather than feature variants
causal provenance retention for force-derived ideas
critical uncertainty and cheapest learning test
validate: evidence level E0-E4 without upgrading desk signals
name: venture-specific point of view and centroid distance
sayability and cultural fit in target markets
timestamped domain/trademark/handle/collision screening
provisional status whenever a required check is unknown
present: one audience decision and one ask
memorability and emotion without inevitability or startup theater

hard_failures: invented number, quote, customer, source, or result
unlabeled speculation presented as observed fact
interchangeable AI-platform concept
generic distribution such as do marketing, content, partnerships, or go viral
portfolio filler included only to satisfy a framework
force-brief finalists all come from direct mitigation or one source consequence
business-model variety presented as causal thesis diversity
ring-3 speculation with no actor-to-institution causal chain
desk research described as validated demand
name described as available or trademark-clear without a timestamped authoritative check
pitch uses inevitability, FOMO, winners/losers, or a promised land without decision-relevant evidence
founder identity claim presented as settled from a short discovery interview
breakthrough finalist is surprising only because its causal chain, buyer, or value mechanism is missing
breakthrough portfolio repeats one canonical idea core under different names, buyers, or business models
generic cliché survives as a finalist because marker-complete prose is mistaken for novelty
solo entry requires capital, access, operating hours, multi-party commitments, or obligations that violate the founder brief without an explicit workaround
revelation uses an unverified first, only, nobody, or global novelty claim to manufacture surprise
different buyer, vertical, or buying occasion is used to preserve the same scarce asset and proof mechanism as a separate finalist
one venture is presented as several finalists even though the same company would sell them as modules using the same buyer relationship, inputs, operating workflow, and compounding asset
pilot price times sustainable solo capacity cannot support the desired game and no credible leverage path is stated
capacity math treats every available founder hour as billable and leaves no explicit room for sales, administration, learning, or variance
learning test lacks either a paid commitment before work or an observable delivered-value decision or outcome after delivery
AI engineering team concept is rejected or reduced solely because one human could not code it after work or because a conventional company would need many engineers
AI engineering team is treated as unlimited autonomous labor without explicit decomposition, verification, integration, permissions, rollback, failure containment, and escalation
AI engineering process is incorrectly used to require an AI-native product, customer-facing AI feature, or runtime model when conventional software better serves the job
